general.description: Boltz-2 has ~40% false positive rate for protein-ligand binding poses
Intrinsically disordered regions and flexible loops are poorly modeled
general.source: Known limitation of all structure prediction methods

general.description: Water molecules and metal ion coordination are not reliably predicted
Predicts single static conformation; proteins are dynamic in reality
Complex (multimer) predictions are less reliable than single-chain
general.source: Lower iPTM scores for multimers vs monomers

general.description: Membrane protein predictions lack lipid bilayer context

low.description: Caution: may be disordered or poorly modeled

very_low.description: Likely disordered or wrong; do not interpret

training_bias.description: Boltz-2 trained primarily on PDB structures, which over-represent well-studied proteins
training_bias.note: Predictions for well-studied proteins benefit from more training data but may overfit to known conformations

general.description: AlphaFold2/3 tends to predict a single dominant conformation
Protein-protein interface predictions less reliable than core structure

mutation_specific.gain_of_function: Gain-of-function mutations may not show structural changes detectable by prediction
mutation_specific.allosteric: Allosteric effects are not captured by static structure prediction
mutation_specific.stability: Predicted structures do not directly indicate thermodynamic stability changes
